creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

I'm trying out 11.0-BETA1 on my ThinkPad T440 with Intel AC 7260. I can connect to wireless network, obtain IP address, and usually transmit a few bits before I start to get timeouts. Ping works even when other types of traffic don't (e.g pkg update or fetch).

Is there some ifconfig knob I could tweak? Or something else in order to make it work reliably?

Any help appreciated.
